Common questions

Can I switch plans anytime?
+
Yes. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no lock-ins. Prorated refunds on annual plans if you cancel within the first 30 days.
What if I'm outside India?
+
International users are charged in USD via Stripe. Pro is $6.99/month or $69.99/year. Basic report is $3.99 one-time. Same features, same guarantee.
Do you offer refunds?
+
7-day money-back guarantee on all plans — email us and we'll refund in full. After 7 days, Pro can be cancelled anytime; you keep access until the end of the paid period.
Will my data be safe?
+
Yes. We store only your mobile number, email (if provided), and subscription status. We never sell data. Payment details are handled by Razorpay and Stripe — we never see your card. Read our full privacy policy.
Is there a family discount?
+
Yes — Pro includes 10 profiles for family and friends at no extra cost. That works out to ₹45/month per profile if your whole family uses it. For larger groups or teams, email us for bulk pricing.
What payment methods do you accept?
+
In India: UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), all major credit and debit cards, net banking from 50+ banks, and wallets via Razorpay. International: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Apple Pay via Stripe.
Still deciding?

Start free. No card required.

Use everything for free. Upgrade only when it feels right. Takes about 2 minutes.
